title: aschamia reginae
intro: Aschamia reginae, also known as 'Queen's Gold', is a plant species that belongs to the genus Aschamia, and is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Aschamia reginae include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and ulcers. Aschamia reginae is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by steeping the leaves or roots in hot water or a solvent, and can be used to treat a range of health issues.
